expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the focus is not demonstrably enforced/covered: "The Phase 5b rubric is generic and does not mention: panel stack composition (explicitly) embedding lifecycle boundaries (explicitly) ..." and summarizes "Case focus explicitly covered ...: NOT DEMONSTRATED".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The result is framed as a "Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement Assessment" and includes a dedicated section "Alignment with primary phase (phase5b)" stating: "This assessment is aligned to Phase 5b only..." It also marks: "Output aligns with primary phase phase5b: PASS (contract alignment demonstrated)".
